# TaxSort

> Sort a year of bank, card, and brokerage transactions into IRS tax
> categories with AI assistance. Import CSV exports, classify each
> transaction toward Schedule A/C line items with Claude, review and
> override by hand, and read grouped summaries for your return. Identity is
> a Nostr keypair (npub); usage is metered in Bitcoin Lightning satoshis —
> no account, no email, no subscription, no KYC.

TaxSort is a single-page web app backed by an MCP (Model Context Protocol)
server. Humans use the web UI; AI agents can call the same MCP tools
directly. TaxSort organizes and categorizes transactions; it does not
provide tax advice.

## What is on this site

- **Sessions** — one workspace per tax year, holding every imported account.
  Sessions lock after a timeout and reopen with a passphrase. A session can
  be shared with a spouse or accountant via a share token.
- **CSV import** — bank and brokerage export formats (SoFi, Chase, Schwab,
  US Bank, PayPal, Coinbase, and a generic mapper), with per-account typing
  (bank / card / investment / loan).
- **AI classification** — Claude proposes an IRS category per transaction;
  every proposal can be reviewed and overridden. Classification rules
  (description pattern + optional amount filter) auto-apply to recurring
  payees, and custom categories extend the built-in IRS set.
- **Summaries** — spending totals grouped by IRS line item.
- **Subscription detection** — scans imported transactions for recurring
  charges and surfaces cancellation information.
- **Advisors** — two Claude-backed chats: a financial advisor and a
  tax-code researcher.
- **Usage transparency** — Anthropic token spend per model with estimated
  USD cost and the sats equivalent.

## Payments and identity

- Sign in with a Nostr npub; prove ownership via a Nostr DM challenge
  (`request_npub_proof` / `receive_npub_proof`).
- Pre-fund a satoshi balance with a Bitcoin Lightning invoice
  (`purchase_credits`); tool calls debit it. `check_price` previews any
  tool's cost.
- All data is keyed to the patron's npub and isolated per patron.
- Monetization is the Tollbooth DPYC protocol (https://tollbooth-dpyc.com):
  operator-controlled dynamic per-tool pricing at the MCP layer.

## For AI agents

- MCP endpoint: https://taxsort-mcp.fastmcp.app/mcp (streamable HTTP)
- Start with `taxsort_service_status` (free, no arguments), then
  `taxsort_check_price`.
- Core workflow tools: `create_session`, `import_csv`, `get_transactions`,
  `save_classifications`, `get_summary`. Rules and categories:
  `get_rules`, `save_rule`, `apply_rules`, `get_custom_categories`.
- Advisor chats: `ask_advisor`, `ask_tax_researcher`.

## Links

- Web app: https://taxsort-app.pages.dev
- MCP endpoint: https://taxsort-mcp.fastmcp.app/mcp
- Source: https://github.com/lonniev/taxsort-mcp
- Tollbooth DPYC (monetization SDK and network): https://tollbooth-dpyc.com
- DPYC Oracle (free community concierge): https://dpyc-oracle.fastmcp.app/mcp
